title: veronica hederifolia var. agrestis
intro: Veronica hederifolia var. agrestis, also known as the field speedwell, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Veronica hederifolia var. agrestis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
